description: Detects path traversal risks in Python: os.path.join with dynamic args, open() with dynamic args. Simplified from Rust: flags all attribute calls (potential os.path.join, os.path.open) and direct identifier calls (potential open()). Cannot verify that args contain function parameters or that path validation is absent without #match? predicate support.

flag.message: Attribute call detected -- verify dynamic user input is not passed to os.path.join or similar path operations without validation
